pageDescription: Create users, manage standard accounts, and reset passwords.
tableSectionDescription: Keep table sorting, but bring creation, status changes, and password reset into one workspace view.
operationsCardDescription: This page covers the essential V1 account maintenance actions.
operationsCardLineOne: New users default to the standard role instead of expanding into a complex role system here.
operationsCardLineTwo: Status changes, deletion, and password reset remain explicit actions to avoid hidden bulk changes.
rulesCardDescription: Make the permission boundary obvious before any action is taken.
rulesCardLineOne: Admin accounts only expose password reset and never show disable or delete actions.
rulesCardLineTwo: Standard accounts can be enabled, disabled, deleted, and reset independently.
deleteDialogDescription: The account {{username}} will be removed permanently. This action cannot be undone.
createUserDescription: Create a new standard account first, then adjust permissions later if needed.
createUserValidationError: Enter both the username and the initial password.
createUserFailed: Failed to create user. Try again later.
passwordLengthValidationError: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPasswordDialogDescription: Set a new sign-in password for {{username}}.
resetPasswordValidationError: Enter a new password with at least 8 characters.
resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. Try again later.
